strategy: High Risk / High Return - Aggressive Short-Term Stock Picks
analyst_note: The week of June 29 opens with AI infrastructure and semiconductor names continuing to lead institutional money flow, with NVDA and AVGO pulling the sector higher on sustained data center demand revisions. Biotech is heating up with two PDUFA dates landing in the July 10-17 window, making pre-catalyst accumulation critical this week. Bitcoin has reclaimed key levels above $108K, injecting fresh momentum into crypto proxies like MSTR and COIN. Small-cap quantum computing and defense tech names are seeing unusual volume surges as rotation from mega-cap tech into high-beta growth accelerates into Q3.
market_summary: Risk appetite is elevated with institutional rotation into high-beta growth, AI infrastructure, crypto proxies, and select biotech binary events driving the most aggressive intraday moves of the month.

macro_backdrop.key_risk: A surprise hawkish Fed speaker or hotter-than-expected PCE revision could slam rate-sensitive growth names and crush risk appetite mid-week, unwinding aggressive momentum trades in hours.

picks.name: Strategy Inc. (MicroStrategy)
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: MSTR holds over 580,000 BTC on its balance sheet and trades at a premium NAV to Bitcoin. Every 5% BTC move translates to 10-20% MSTR move due to its leveraged-to-BTC structure. With BTC above $108K and institutional demand for regulated Bitcoin exposure surging, MSTR is the highest-beta liquid vehicle available.
picks.thesis: Bitcoin broke above $108K last week and is now consolidating above that level with strong spot ETF inflows from institutional buyers, setting up MSTR for another leg higher. The company's aggressive BTC accumulation strategy and rumored additional purchase announcement expected this week could act as an independent catalyst on top of BTC price action.
picks.technical_setup: MSTR broke out of a 3-week flag consolidation between $390-$415 on Friday with volume 40% above the 20-day average. RSI at 63 - not yet overbought. Price is above all major moving averages (20, 50, 200-day). Key breakout level was $415, now acting as support. Next resistance at $480.
picks.catalyst: Bitcoin holding above $108K with potential new ATH push toward $115K this week; possible additional BTC purchase announcement from Strategy management; month-end institutional rebalancing into crypto proxies.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $422. Enter on any Monday dip - do not chase above $435. If BTC drops below $105K intraday, hold off on entry until stabilization.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% of shares at $478 (conservative, ~13% gain). Let remaining shares ride to $560 if BTC holds above $110K and momentum sustains. Exit ALL shares if BTC drops below $103K.
picks.stop_note: If MSTR closes below $390 (prior consolidation base), exit entire position immediately. This level breaking means the breakout failed.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - can move 12-18% in a single day on BTC news
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $478. Move stop to $415 (breakeven area) on remaining shares. Trail stop $30 below price as it climbs. Never let a winner turn into a loss after 8% gain.
picks.risk_factors: BTC flash crash below $100K would send MSTR down 20-30% in hours. SEC regulatory action on crypto proxies. Broader market risk-off. MSTR can gap down hard overnight on BTC futures moves.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: MSTR can lose 20% as fast as it gains. This is not a BTC ETF - it can diverge sharply. Size at 1% of portfolio maximum.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search MSTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $422  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: IonQ Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: IonQ is the leading pure-play public quantum computing company and reacts explosively to any quantum computing news, government contracts, or tech partnership announcements. The stock has 35%+ short interest and institutional accumulation has been building since May. A single contract announcement can move it 20-40% in a day.
picks.thesis: IonQ is consolidating just below its 52-week high of $41.20 with unusual institutional buying volume on the weekly chart, suggesting a major move is imminent. The Pentagon's newly announced Quantum Advantage Initiative is expected to award contracts to commercial quantum firms by July 15, and IonQ is the most likely primary beneficiary given its existing DoD relationships.
picks.technical_setup: IONQ is forming a bull flag on the daily chart just above the $36 support level with 5 consecutive green candles on declining volume - a classic continuation pattern. Volume surged 3x normal on the prior Thursday breakout above $37.50. RSI at 61, MACD crossing bullish. Breakout above $41.20 targets $52-$55.
picks.catalyst: DoD Quantum Advantage Initiative contract award expected by July 15; potential partnership announcement with major cloud provider; sector momentum from IBM and Google quantum computing headlines driving money into pure-play names.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $37.80. Enter before July 3 holiday weekend. Do not chase above $40 - wait for a pullback to $37-$38 range. If it gaps up Monday open above $41, skip this entry.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $44.50 (conservative, ~18% gain). Hold remaining shares for $56 target if DoD contract is confirmed. Sell all remaining shares by July 17 regardless of price.
picks.stop_note: Close below $34.50 invalidates the bull flag pattern. Exit entire position immediately - no exceptions. This is a hard stop.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - government contract delays or denials can drop 25% instantly
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $44.50. Move stop to $38 (entry area) on remaining shares. Trail $4 below price as it moves higher. Exit all before July 17.
picks.risk_factors: High short interest means volatility cuts both ways. Contract delay or competitor award would hammer shares. Broader tech selloff would hit this hard. No revenue yet to support valuation fundamentally.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Pure speculative play on government contracts that may not materialize on schedule. 30%+ short interest means vicious moves in both directions.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search IONQ  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $37.80  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: NVIDIA Corporation
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: NVDA remains the highest-conviction AI infrastructure trade with analyst estimate revisions accelerating upward through Q3. The stock is breaking to new all-time highs on massive volume as hyperscaler capex commitments for Blackwell Ultra and next-gen GPU clusters are revised sharply higher. Even at large-cap, NVDA moves 8-15% on catalyst events.
picks.thesis: NVDA broke above its prior all-time high of $153 last week and is now in price discovery with no overhead resistance. Three major cloud providers raised GPU procurement guidance last week, directly driving NVDA revenue estimate revisions higher by 15-20% for fiscal 2027. Momentum is self-reinforcing as passive funds are forced to buy more shares at higher weights.
picks.technical_setup: Clean all-time high breakout above $153 on 60% above-average volume last Thursday. Price is extended above the 20-day MA ($144) but momentum breakouts often run 8-12% before first pullback. RSI at 71 - entering overbought but can remain overbought for weeks in strong uptrends. Target measured move to $175-$185.
picks.catalyst: Continued hyperscaler capex upgrade cycle; Taiwan supply chain confirms Blackwell Ultra shipments accelerating in Q3; potential preannouncement of Q2 guidance raise before August earnings.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $156 to catch any Monday morning dip. Do not chase above $162 on open. If it opens above $162, wait for intraday pullback to $158-$160 before entering.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $174 (conservative, ~11.5% gain). Let remaining shares run to $192 if AI infrastructure headlines continue driving momentum. Never hold through any major news disappointment.
picks.stop_note: Close below $146 (breakout level) means failed breakout. Exit full position. This is non-negotiable - failed all-time high breakouts reverse fast.
picks.volatility_profile: High - can move 5-10% on single AI infrastructure headline
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $174. Move stop to $155 on remaining shares. Trail stop $8 below price. Sell all remaining before any major macro news events.
picks.risk_factors: Any export restriction escalation with China could drop NVDA 10% overnight. Overbought RSI means pullback risk is elevated. Valuation stretched at 35x forward sales. Single supply chain disruption headline would hurt badly.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK for a large cap: NVDA has dropped 15-20% from peaks multiple times. Even great companies correct hard from overbought levels.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search NVDA  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $156  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Coinbase Global Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: COIN is the highest-beta liquid crypto infrastructure play available. It trades at 4-6x its revenue correlation to BTC price and acts as a leveraged play on crypto market volumes. With BTC above $108K, trading volumes and Coinbase revenues are surging. High short interest at 18% adds squeeze potential to any crypto rally.
picks.thesis: Coinbase Q2 trading volumes are tracking to be the strongest quarter since the 2021 bull market peak, driven by institutional spot BTC ETF activity and surging retail participation. With BTC at ATH territory, COIN's revenue is directly correlated and the stock typically leads BTC moves by 24-48 hours as traders anticipate earnings beats.
picks.technical_setup: COIN broke above the $255 resistance level that held for 6 weeks on Thursday with volume 55% above 50-day average. The weekly chart shows a cup-and-handle pattern completing with a measured move target to $310-$320. RSI at 65, MACD freshly bullish crossover. Strong close above $255 confirms pattern.
picks.catalyst: BTC holding above $108K driving record Q2 volumes; potential crypto regulatory clarity from Senate Digital Asset Bill advancing; Q2 earnings preview analysts upgrading estimates sharply higher.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $259. Enter on any morning dip - Monday often sees crypto proxy weakness in first 30 minutes. Do not chase above $268 on open.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $298 (conservative, ~15% gain). Hold remaining shares for $335 if BTC pushes to new ATH above $112K. Exit all if BTC drops below $103K.
picks.stop_note: Close below $240 means the breakout failed and prior resistance is being retested. Exit full position immediately.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - BTC flash crashes can drop COIN 15% in minutes
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $298. Move stop to $258 on remaining shares. Trail $18 below price. If BTC hits new ATH, consider holding full position to $335.
picks.risk_factors: BTC crash would devastate this trade - COIN trades at 2x BTC beta. SEC or regulatory news could reverse all gains. Crypto hacks or exchange failures create sudden risk-off. Q2 earnings could disappoint if volumes were front-loaded.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: COIN is a leveraged bet on crypto prices. A BTC drawdown of 15% can send COIN down 25-35%. Never size this larger than 1-2% of total portfolio.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search COIN  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $259  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
picks.trade_type: Momentum Breakout + Government AI Contract Cycle
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Palantir is breaking into new all-time high territory as its AIP (Artificial Intelligence Platform) commercial deployments and government contracts accelerate simultaneously. The stock has a high short interest from skeptics and every new contract announcement triggers a short squeeze amplifier on top of fundamental momentum.
picks.thesis: PLTR is entering a second-half fiscal year surge as government fiscal year-end (September 30) drives agencies to commit remaining AI budgets to Palantir's AIP platform. Simultaneously, commercial AIP boot camp deals converting to full contracts are hitting a velocity not seen before, with Q2 revenue growth expected to exceed 36% year-over-year when reported in August.
picks.technical_setup: PLTR broke above $108 all-time high resistance last week on the highest weekly volume since November 2024. Now consolidating between $110-$114 in a tight bull flag. RSI at 68, momentum is building. Breakout above $114 on volume targets $130-$140 measured move. 50-day MA at $98 provides strong underlying support.
picks.catalyst: Government fiscal year-end AI budget deployment cycle; potential major new DoD AIP contract announcement expected between July 1-15; Q2 revenue guidance raise potential as commercial pipeline converts at record rate.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $110.50. Enter during any Monday morning dip. Do not chase above $115 without seeing volume confirmation. Scale in with two tranches if possible.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $126 (conservative, ~14% gain). Hold remaining for $145 if government contract news hits before July 15. Sell all remaining by July 17.
picks.stop_note: Close below $102 means the all-time high breakout is failing. Exit entire position. Do not hold through a failed breakout - they reverse sharply.
picks.volatility_profile: High - government contract news can move 8-15% instantly
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $126. Move stop to $110 on remaining shares. Trail $8 below price as it moves higher. Exit all before August earnings if the trade hasn't worked by then.
picks.risk_factors: Contract delay or loss to competitor (C3.ai or Microsoft) would hit hard. High valuation (50x+ forward revenue) makes it vulnerable to any risk-off. Short interest at 22% means whipsaw risk is high.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: PLTR trades at extreme valuations and has dropped 30%+ from peaks before. The all-time high breakout must hold or this reverses fast.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search PLTR  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $110.50  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Viking Therapeutics Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Viking's VK2735 obesity drug (both subcutaneous and oral formulations) represents the most watched non-Novo/Eli Lilly obesity play in the market. Phase 3 data readouts can move biotech stocks 50-100% in a single session. Viking has the oral formulation advantage that competitors lack, and the stock has been building a base ahead of key data.
picks.thesis: Viking is expected to report Phase 3 subcutaneous VK2735 data in mid-July that could position the company for a partnership or buyout at a massive premium - Eli Lilly and Novo Nordisk are both actively seeking obesity pipeline assets to diversify from semaglutide dependency. The stock has been accumulating quietly with institutional buyers building positions ahead of the catalyst.
picks.technical_setup: VKTX has formed a 6-week base between $62-$72 with declining volatility (volatility contraction pattern). Volume has been steadily increasing over the past 2 weeks suggesting institutional accumulation. RSI at 55 - neither overbought nor oversold. Break above $72 triggers a run to $90-$100 on the measured move. 50-day MA at $65 acting as strong support.
picks.catalyst: Phase 3 VK2735 subcutaneous obesity data readout expected week of July 14; potential partnership announcement with major pharma; oral obesity drug Phase 2 data update possibility this summer.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $67. This is a pre-catalyst accumulation - you want to be in before the data drops. Do not chase above $73. This is a binary event - size at 1% MAX.
picks.sell_note: Sell 75% at $82 if data is positive (take most profits on the event). Let 25% of shares run to $105 if data is a strong beat with partnership rumors. If data is negative, shares could fall to $35 - exit immediately at market.
picks.stop_note: Close below $60 before data readout means institutional sellers are exiting (possibly know data is bad). Exit all shares immediately. Never hold through data if the pre-data setup breaks down.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - binary event stock can move 40-60% on data day
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX - binary event risk
picks.exit_plan: This is a binary event trade. Sell 75% of shares immediately when data drops positive. Never hold through data with a full position. Consider selling half before data to lock profits if stock runs up pre-catalyst.
picks.risk_factors: Phase 3 trial failure would drop VKTX 40-60% in a single session. Even good data can disappoint vs expectations (sell the news risk). Partner deal falling apart could also reverse the trade.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: This is a BINARY EVENT. The stock can fall 50% overnight if clinical data misses. NEVER put more than 1% of your portfolio in any single binary biotech event. You can lose most of your investment.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search VKTX  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $67  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Rocket Lab USA Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Rocket Lab is the only pure-play small launch company with a real commercial revenue stream and a pipeline of defense contracts. The Neutron heavy rocket development and NSSL contract potential in H2 2026 could re-rate the stock significantly. Defense space spending is accelerating and RKLB is the only liquid pure-play beyond SpaceX (which is private).
picks.thesis: RKLB secured two significant defense contracts in Q2 and its Electron launch cadence is hitting new records. The stock is consolidating near 52-week highs and any Neutron development milestone announcement or new government contract would trigger a breakout above $26 resistance that could quickly reach $30-$35. Defense space is the hottest institutional theme of 2026.
picks.technical_setup: RKLB has consolidated between $22.50-$26 for the past 5 weeks, building energy. On-balance volume (OBV) is trending upward even during the consolidation, suggesting accumulation. MACD is about to cross bullish on the daily chart. Break above $26 with volume targeting $30-$33 measured move. 50-day MA at $21.50 is rising steeply.
picks.catalyst: Neutron rocket development milestone update expected in July; potential NSSL Phase 3 contract award from Space Force; Electron launch record Q2 results to be reported in August with possible preannouncement.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $23.80. Enter on any Monday weakness. Do not chase above $25.50 - wait for the pullback. The best entry is near $23-$24 range.
picks.sell_note: Sell 50% at $28.50 (conservative, ~19.7% gain). Hold remaining for $34 if defense contract news hits. Exit all remaining shares by July 17 to avoid holding through earnings uncertainty.
picks.stop_note: Close below $21.50 (50-day MA and key support) means the consolidation is breaking down bearishly. Exit entire position.
picks.volatility_profile: Very High - launch failures or contract losses move stock 20%+ instantly
picks.exit_plan: Sell half at $28.50. Move stop to $23.50 on remaining shares. Trail $2.50 below price. Sell all by July 17.
picks.risk_factors: Electron launch failure would be catastrophic for share price. Neutron delays (common in space) disappoint expectations. Defense contract award timeline unpredictable. Broader tech selloff would hit hard at this valuation.
picks.warning: HIGH RISK: Space company with no path to profit yet. Contract losses or launch failures can drop 25% instantly. Keep position small.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search RKLB  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $23.80  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

picks.name: Upstart Holdings Inc.
picks.why_high_risk_high_return: Upstart has 38% short interest - one of the highest in the fintech space - and is approaching Q2 earnings with a setup where falling interest rates and improving credit conditions could produce a massive revenue beat. Short squeezes in high-short-interest stocks with earnings beats can produce 30-50% moves in 48 hours.
picks.thesis: The Fed's pivot toward rate cuts in 2026 has dramatically improved Upstart's loan conversion rates, as lower rates make its AI-driven personal loans more attractive and increase bank partner appetite. Q2 transaction volumes are tracking well above Q1 levels, and with 38% short interest, a revenue beat above $210M would trigger a violent short squeeze that could push the stock to $55-$65 rapidly.
picks.technical_setup: UPST broke above the 200-day MA at $38.50 two weeks ago and has been consolidating above it, confirming a potential regime change from bearish to bullish. RSI at 58, neither overbought nor oversold. Cup-and-handle forming on the weekly chart. Earnings are the catalyst to break the $46 resistance. Volume has been above average on up days.
picks.catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings report expected around July 7-10, 2026; Fed rate trajectory supporting AI lending business model recovery; analyst estimate revisions have been too conservative given improving credit environment.
picks.buy_note: Place limit order at $41. Enter before July 4 holiday. This is a pre-earnings trade - enter at least 5 trading days before expected report date. Do not chase above $44 pre-earnings.
picks.sell_note: If earnings beat is strong, sell 60% at $52 day-of or next morning. Let 40% run to $65 if short squeeze ignites. If earnings disappoint, exit immediately at market open - do not hold through a miss with high short interest.
picks.stop_note: Close below $37 before earnings means the pre-earnings setup is failing. Exit immediately. If earnings miss, exit at market open regardless of price.
picks.volatility_profile: Extreme - earnings + high short interest = massive move potential in both directions
picks.position_size_pct: 1% of portfolio MAX - binary earnings event
picks.exit_plan: Sell majority at $52 on earnings beat reaction. Move stop to $41 on any remaining shares immediately after earnings. Never hold more than 48 hours post-earnings in a high-short-interest name.
picks.risk_factors: Earnings miss with 38% short interest means violent downside - stock could fall 25-35% overnight on a miss. Credit conditions could be worse than expected. Any macro headwinds hit fintech hardest. Lock-up expirations or insider selling pre-announcement.
picks.warning: EXTREME RISK: Earnings + 38% short interest = this stock can move 30% in EITHER direction overnight. This is not a place for large positions. Treat as a lottery ticket with a 1% portfolio allocation.
picks.robinhood_steps: 1. Search UPST  2. Tap Buy  3. Select Shares  4. Limit Order  5. Set price $41  6. Enter quantity  7. Good Till Cancelled  8. Submit

When AI names are hot, SOUN can move 20-30% in two or three sessions. New restaurant chain and automotive partnership deals are being announced monthly, and any major brand partnership could ignite a squeeze.

A Nvidia-adjacent AI sentiment wave, combined with SOUN's high short interest, creates a powder keg setup where any positive announcement triggers a violent move higher.

COVID vaccine revenue collapsed and pipeline is uncertain. No near-term binary catalyst with high-conviction setup. Pass this week.
Super Micro Computer is in the watchlist but accounting concerns and SEC investigation overhang make risk/reward asymmetry too negative this specific week. Avoiding until overhang resolves.

market_watch.note: Small-cap proxy Russell 2000 ETF. Above $220 = risk-on environment for high-beta small cap plays. A break below $220 would signal rotation out of risk assets and would require cutting all small-cap positions immediately.
Nasdaq-100 proxy. Holding above $528 confirms the tech uptrend. A break below $528 would signal AI trade exhaustion and require reducing NVDA, PLTR, SOUN exposure immediately.
Bitcoin holding above $103K is essential for MSTR and COIN trades. Drop below $103K = exit both positions immediately. Push above $112K = add to both positions aggressively.
Fear index below $20 = low fear, risk-on environment. VIX spike above $20 this week would signal sudden risk-off and require cutting all speculative positions by 50% immediately.

news_signals.headline: Hyperscaler trio Microsoft Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud all raise AI infrastructure capex guidance for H2 2026 by cumulative $180B above prior forecasts
news_signals.why: Direct revenue catalyst - every dollar of cloud AI capex increase translates to GPU purchases. NVDA captures 85% of the AI GPU market. This is the most direct positive news possible for NVDA.

news_signals.headline: Bitcoin spot ETFs record $3.2B single-day inflow - largest since January 2024 launch
news_signals.why: Spot ETF inflows directly increase institutional BTC demand, pushing BTC price higher and increasing MSTR's NAV. Also validates MSTR's BTC accumulation strategy to skeptical investors.

news_signals.headline: Pentagon announces Quantum Advantage Initiative with $2.4B in commercial quantum contracts to be awarded Q3 2026
news_signals.why: IonQ is the primary commercial quantum computing company with existing DoD relationships. This contract pool directly addresses IONQ's core government revenue opportunity and validates the sector thesis.

news_signals.headline: Senate Banking Committee advances Digital Asset Market Structure Act with bipartisan 14-9 vote, heading to full Senate floor
news_signals.why: Regulatory clarity is the single biggest overhang on Coinbase's US business. Any legislative progress removes uncertainty and could re-rate COIN's valuation multiple upward significantly.

news_signals.headline: SoundHound AI announces 5-year voice AI deployment deal with Yum! Brands covering 35,000 restaurant locations globally
news_signals.why: Large restaurant chain deals are exactly the type of announcement that triggers short covering in SOUN given its 40% short interest. Revenue visibility from a 5-year deal directly addresses bear thesis about customer concentration.

news_signals.headline: Federal Reserve Governor signals two additional rate cuts expected in H2 2026 citing progress toward 2% inflation target
news_signals.why: Rate cuts are the single most important macro driver for Upstart's lending economics. Lower rates improve loan conversion rates and bank partner appetite. This directly increases Q3 and Q4 revenue estimates.

daily_wisdom: The market rewards the disciplined, not the brave. Your stop loss is not a sign of weakness - it is your contract with yourself that you will not let a bad trade become a catastrophic one. Cut losers at 8-10%, let winners run to 25-50%, and never confuse a high-conviction thesis with certainty. The best traders are right 55% of the time and make money because their winners are 3x their losers - not because they are always right.
risk_warning: EXTREME RISK: Every pick on this list is a highly speculative, high-volatility stock that can lose 20-50% of its value rapidly and without warning. Biotech binary events can result in total loss of your investment in a single trading session. Crypto-linked stocks can crash 30% overnight on BTC price moves. Short squeeze setups can reverse violently. These picks are NOT suitable for retirement savings, emergency funds, or money you cannot afford to lose entirely. Position size at 1-2% of portfolio MAXIMUM per pick. This is NOT financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Always buy SHARES only - never use leverage, margin, or derivatives.
